payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Mostly visible rectangular beige/cream fabric pillow with horizontal thin gray-blue stripes, smooth cotton-like texture and light surface folds; pillow appears plump and slightly edge-cropped on the left side, approximately 0.6 m from the camera.
